chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-374 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on statement 19.01.2021 Mr. Mehmood Hussain Siddiqui advocate for petitioners. -.-.-. Statement dated 22.12.2020 has been filed on behalf of the petitioners seeking withdrawal of the present petition with permission to file a fresh one. Learned counsel for the petitioners reiterates the contents of the above statement. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed as withdrawn with no order as to costs. As far as the question of filing a fresh petition is concerned, petitioners may avail their remedy if the law so permits. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
